modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Scanner locks up with "fail to lock the document" error in XTender.

full_description_text: I was trying to scan documents into XTender when I got an error message. It said “fail to lock the document with DOCid” and then the system just locked up. This keeps happening every time I try to scan, and it’s really frustrating.
short_description: Scanner locks up with "fail to lock the document" error in XTender.
description: I was trying to scan documents into XTender when I got an error message. It said “fail to lock the document with DOCid” and then the system just locked up. This keeps happening every time I try to scan, and it’s really frustrating.
